{"id":"smallhold-624","title":"host-meta: XML endpoint for WebFinger discovery","description":"Implement /.well-known/host-meta returning XML with a Link element whose template points to the WebFinger URL. Some servers check this before attempting WebFinger.

Test discipline:
- Parse the response XML and verify the Link/@template attribute points to the correct WebFinger URL
- Test Content-Type is application/xrd+xml

Defensive programming:
- Do not use a templating library for 10 lines of XML — just format! a string to avoid introducing an XML dep","acceptance_criteria":"Valid XML with correct WebFinger template; Content-Type application/xrd+xml; domain is correctly interpolated","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:28:27Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:28:27Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-4uc","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:28:35Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
